mapper.sql: task_id, assignee_sales_id, assigner_id, channel_id, title, description, due_date, status, completed_at, linked_record_id, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_sales_followup_task ( task_id, assignee_sales_id, assigner_id, channel_id, title, description, due_date, status, completed_at, linked_record_id, create_time ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{assigneeSalesId}, #{assignerId}, #{channelId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{dueDate}, #{status}, #{completedAt}, #{linkedRecordId}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT task_id FROM jst_sales_followup_task WHERE status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') AND due_date < CURDATE()
mapper.update:
UPDATE jst_sales_followup_task SET status = 'overdue', update_time = NOW() WHERE task_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM jst_sales_followup_task WHERE status IN ('pending', 'in_progress') AND due_date = CURDATE() ORDER BY assignee_sales_id, due_date
